[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Call me a joker,   call me a fool.    Right at this moment I'm totally[/tab]
cool.

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Clear as a crystal, sharp as a knife.  I feel like I'm in the prime of my[/tab]
life.

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Sometimes it feels like I'm going 2 fast/I don't know how long this feeling[/tab]
will last.

[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]
   Maybe it's only tonite.   Darling I  don't know why     I go to ex-[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]
    tremes.                    Too high or too low there ain't no in be-[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
   weens.                    And if I    stand or I        fall,[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]Fm6[/ch]                [ch]Fsus[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
    it's all or nothing at all. Darling I don't know why     I go to ex-[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]
   tremes.                            Sometimes I'm tired, sometimes I'm[/tab]
shot.

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]
Sometimes I don't know how much more I've got/Maybe I'm headed over the[/tab]
hill.

[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F/A[/ch]
Maybe I've set myself up for the kill. Tell me how much do u think u can[/tab]
take.

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
until the heart in u is starting to break?/Sometimes it feels like it will.[/tab]
Darling, I

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
   don't know why       I go to      extremes.                   Too high or[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]F/A[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]Fm6[/ch]
 sure         when I'm gone,             I won't be out there too long.[/tab]
Darling,

 I don't know why       I go to       extremes.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
